description_long: This house features a combination of a main rectangular structure and an attached side extension, both topped with dark brown gable roofs. The exterior walls are primarily light gray with visible red-brown structural accents, giving a utilitarian yet warm appearance. The main facade is lined with several rectangular windows, evenly spaced and framed in a simple style. The side extension, clad in wood paneling, adds visual interest and likely serves as a garage or storage area. The roof surfaces are corrugated and slightly textured, suggesting durability and weather resistance. Overall, the house blends practical design with rustic elements, suitable for suburban or semi-rural neighborhoods.
description: A rectangular house with a dark brown gable roof, light gray walls with red-brown accents, and a wood-paneled side extension. Multiple rectangular windows line the main facade, giving it a practical yet rustic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gable roof, two windows, and the wood-paneled side extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade with four windows and the full length of the wood extension.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the wood extension and the main roof's gable end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the main facade with four windows and the entry door on the wood extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple door on the wood-paneled extension, no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade.
